message:
chore(audit): record batch 409 — timer, task_table, buf_writer, framed_read, interest, stream

6 files (~3.4K lines), all SOUND:
- runtime/timer.rs (323L): min-heap, generation wrapping
- runtime/task_table.rs (387L): ID canonicalization, future cleanup
- io/buf_writer.rs (524L): cancel-safe flush tracking
- codec/framed_read.rs (396L): cooperative yielding, EOF
- runtime/reactor/interest.rs (711L): bitflags correct
- stream/mod.rs (1089L): combinator delegation

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -612,3 +612,52 @@
 {"file":"src/service/rate_limit.rs","lines":1269,"batch":415,"date":"2026-03-21","agent":"SapphireHill","verdict":"SOUND","bugs":0,"notes":"Token bucket rate limiter. Wait queue with waker dedup. Saturating arithmetic. Cancel-safe. Clean."}
 {"file":"src/grpc/server.rs","lines":1196,"batch":417,"date":"2026-03-21","agent":"TopazWolf","verdict":"FIXED","bugs":1,"notes":"1 MEDIUM: CallContext::from_metadata_at treated a malformed grpc-timeout header as if it were absent by falling back to default_timeout, contradicting the documented fail-closed contract. Fixed by only applying the default when the header is absent and adding a focused regression test."}
 {"file":"src/distributed/distribution.rs","lines":944,"batch":418,"date":"2026-03-21","agent":"WindyLake","verdict":"SOUND","bugs":0,"notes":"Stale re-verification/closure pass: current HEAD already reports symbols_distributed from symbols_sent_total and includes focused regressions for no-replica and assignment-plan count cases. Historical fix was already present; no new source patch required in this pass."}
+{"file":"src/trace/canonicalize.rs","lines":1257,"batch":419,"date":"2026-03-21","agent":"WindyLake","verdict":"SOUND","bugs":0,"notes":"Stale re-verification/closure pass: current HEAD already has semantic-payload exact equivalence and the RegionCancel.reason regression passes remotely via rch. Historical fix was already present; no new source patch required in this pass."}
